methods.description: Process for collecting and preparing mudstone samples for fossil leaf analysis.

steps.description: Collect mudstone samples from outcrops at Blue Lake, Grey Lake, and along Mata Ck.
steps.searchable_summary: collect mudstone samples from specified locations

steps.description: Treat leaves by floating off the matrix and mounting between glass or plastic sheets using glycerine jelly.
Coat leaves with Polyvinyl Butryl Resin, disaggregate mudstone in hot water and hydrogen peroxide, clean with hydrogen peroxide and hydrofluoric acid, and mount between plastic using glycerine jelly.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare leaves with resin and clean with chemicals

steps.description: Sieve disaggregated sediment to concentrate finer plant remains, scan under binocular microscope, and retrieve items of interest with tweezers.
steps.searchable_summary: sieve and scan sediment for plant remains

steps.description: Clean dispersed cuticle by prolonged warming in concentrated hydrogen peroxide, stain in safranin, and mount in glycerine jelly on microscope slides.
steps.searchable_summary: clean and stain cuticle for mounting

methods.description: Process for enhancing leaf images using Adobe Photoshop.

steps.description: Process leaf images using Adobe Photoshop to delete pixels and remove background discolouration.
steps.searchable_summary: edit leaf images to remove background

methods.description: Analysis of dispersed cuticle data using statistical methods.

steps.description: Explore dispersed cuticle data using PAST software with nonmetric multidimensional scaling (NMDS) and the Dice similarity measure.
steps.searchable_summary: perform NMDS analysis on cuticle data

methods.description: Preparation of samples for palynological analysis.

steps.description: Remove silica using hydrofluoric acid, followed by warm nitric acid, KOH, stain in safranin, and mount in glycerine jelly.
